payload.answer: I found a conflict: Sara is already recorded as your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. I did not update the memory without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The name 'Sara' matches the existing entity, but the new relationship conflicts with the existing relationship.

repair_options: Confirm that Sara is your daughter and reject the niece relationship.
Replace the existing relationship and record Sara as your niece instead of your daughter.
Clarify that these are two different people named Sara.
